summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Daily Horoscope App - backend APIs and frontend UI integration. All core functionality working including GPT-5.2 horoscope generation, theme toggle, zodiac sign selection, and responsive design.

integration_issues.flow: Zodiac sign persistence in specific test scenario
integration_issues.issue: In one test case, selecting Leo and navigating to dashboard occasionally showed landing page instead of Leo dashboard

passed_tests: Zodiac signs API returns all 12 signs with correct data structure
GPT-5.2 horoscope generation for daily/weekly/monthly types
API error handling for invalid signs/types
Landing page loads with 'Cosmic Wisdom' title
Zodiac sign selection with visual feedback (gold border)
Continue button appears after sign selection
Daily horoscope tab loads AI-generated content
Weekly horoscope tab loads AI-generated content
Monthly horoscope tab loads AI-generated content
Back button navigation to landing page
Color palette implementation (Mustard, Yellow, Brown, Gold)
action_item_for_main_agent: One minor issue found: In specific test scenarios, zodiac sign persistence may occasionally fail. This is a low-priority issue as core functionality works correctly in normal user flows.
